awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Josue Castillo Romero
awards.detail: Range: 21 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Joe Stoffel
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.5 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Hannah Hulbert
awards.detail: Range: 18 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Women's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Chelsea Yoder
awards.detail: Volatility: 2.2 — nearly the same percentile every week
